_description: External reference data for SN2 F- + CH3F validation tests

_sources.czako_2015: Szabó et al., J. Chem. Phys. 142, 244301 (2015)
_sources.shaik_1992: Shaik & Pross, J. Chem. Soc. Perkin Trans. 2, 1019 (1992)

ch3f_nist_fundamentals_cm1._note: Experimental fundamental (anharmonic) frequencies. Harmonic QM values will be ~3-5% higher.

sn2_barrier_ts_minus_complex_kcal_mol._note: Barrier height from ion-dipole complex to Walden inversion TS

sn2_barrier_ts_minus_reactants_kcal_mol._note: Barrier relative to separated reactants (F- + CH3F). Near zero or negative = essentially barrierless.

qm_level_of_theory._note_scaling: Standard harmonic frequency scaling factor for B3LYP/6-31+G(d). Apply to QM harmonic frequencies before comparing to experimental fundamentals.
